'''solapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgarizing|vulgarizing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgarizing|vulgarizing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| solapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:solapithi|solapithi]] || [[word:solapiji|solapiji]] || [[word:solapishi|solapishi]] || [[word:solapiki|solapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:solaputhuthu|solaputhuthu]] || [[word:solapujuju|solapujuju]] || [[word:solapushushu|solapushushu]] || [[word:solapukuku|solapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:solaputhu|solaputhu]] || [[word:solapuju|solapuju]] || [[word:solapushu|solapushu]] || [[word:solapuku|solapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:solapufthuf|solapufthuf]] || [[word:solapufjuf|solapufjuf]] || [[word:solapufshuf|solapufshuf]] || [[word:solapufkuf|solapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:solapethe|solapethe]] || [[word:solapeje|solapeje]] || [[word:solapeshe|solapeshe]] || [[word:solapeke|solapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:solapothotho|solapothotho]] || [[word:solapojojo|solapojojo]] || [[word:solaposhosho|solaposhosho]] || [[word:solapokoko|solapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:solapotho|solapotho]] || [[word:solapojo|solapojo]] || [[word:solaposho|solaposho]] || [[word:solapoko|solapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:solapofthof|solapofthof]] || [[word:solapofjof|solapofjof]] || [[word:solapofshof|solapofshof]] || [[word:solapofkof|solapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:solapĂŻfthĂŻf|solapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfjĂŻf|solapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfshĂŻf|solapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfkĂŻf|solapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:solapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|solapĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|solapĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|solapĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|solapĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:solapĂŻfthĂŻf|solapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfjĂŻf|solapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfshĂŻf|solapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfkĂŻf|solapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:solapĂŻfthĂŻf|solapĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfjĂŻf|solapĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfshĂŻf|solapĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:solapĂŻfkĂŻf|solapĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:solapĂŠthĂŠ|solapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:solapĂŠjĂŠ|solapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:solapĂŠshĂŠ|solapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:solapĂŠkĂŠ|solapĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:solapathatha|solapathatha]] || [[word:solapajaja|solapajaja]] || [[word:solapashasha|solapashasha]] || [[word:solapakaka|solapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:solapatha|solapatha]] || [[word:solapaja|solapaja]] || [[word:solapasha|solapasha]] || [[word:solapaka|solapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:solapafthaf|solapafthaf]] || [[word:solapafjaf|solapafjaf]] || [[word:solapafshaf|solapafshaf]] || [[word:solapafkaf|solapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:solapasha|solapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:solapshĂ«sha|solapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:solaprosha|solaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:solapmusha|solapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:solapyasha|solapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosolapnkshĂ«sha|gosolapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosolapnkrosha|gosolapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosolapnkmusha|gosolapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosolapnkyasha|gosolapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:solalapasha|solalapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:solalapshĂ«sha|solalapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:solalaprosha|solalaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:solalapmusha|solalapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:solalapyasha|solalapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosolalapnkshĂ«sha|gosolalapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosolalapnkrosha|gosolalapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosolalapnkmusha|gosolalapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosolalapnkyasha|gosolalapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:selĂŠpasha|selĂŠpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:selĂŠpshĂ«sha|selĂŠpshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:selĂŠprosha|selĂŠprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:selĂŠpmusha|selĂŠpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:selĂŠpyasha|selĂŠpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goselĂŠpnkshĂ«sha|goselĂŠpnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goselĂŠpnkrosha|goselĂŠpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goselĂŠpnkmusha|goselĂŠpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goselĂŠpnkyasha|goselĂŠpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:solfapasha|solfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:solfapshĂ«sha|solfapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:solfaprosha|solfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:solfapmusha|solfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:solfapyasha|solfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosolfapnkshĂ«sha|gosolfapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosolfapnkrosha|gosolfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosolfapnkmusha|gosolfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosolfapnkyasha|gosolfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
